item.title: How Taliban IEDs Became More Advanced
item.description: A historical look at how Taliban IEDs evolved over time, and the challenges they posed to service members in the field.

media:content.media:title: How Taliban IEDs Became More Advanced
media:content.media:description: A historical look at how Taliban IEDs evolved over time, and the challenges they posed to service members in the field.

item.title: Douglas Dillard Joins the Army at 16
item.description: Douglas Dillard enlisted in the U.S. Army at age 16, determined to help the United States win World War II.

media:content.media:title: Douglas Dillard Joins the Army at 16
media:content.media:description: Douglas Dillard enlisted in the U.S. Army at age 16, determined to help the United States win World War II.

item.title: A .51-Caliber Gun and Its Impact
item.description: A veteran reflects on the force of a .51-caliber gun and the lasting impact of being hit, in a firsthand wartime account.

media:content.media:title: A .51-Caliber Gun and Its Impact
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on the force of a .51-caliber gun and the lasting impact of being hit, in a firsthand wartime account.

item.title: Charles Brooking and PT Boat Missions
item.description: Gunner’s Mate Second Class Charles Brooking and his PT boat crew carried out nighttime missions against Japanese vessels, disrupting supply lines and reinforcements.

media:content.media:title: Charles Brooking and PT Boat Missions
media:content.media:description: Gunner’s Mate Second Class Charles Brooking and his PT boat crew carried out nighttime missions against Japanese vessels, disrupting supply lines and reinforcements.

item.title: Guardians of the Skies in Vietnam
item.description: A respectful look at aerial service in Vietnam, highlighting courage, duty, and the experiences of those who served in the skies.

media:content.media:title: Guardians of the Skies in Vietnam
media:content.media:description: A respectful look at aerial service in Vietnam, highlighting courage, duty, and the experiences of those who served in the skies.

item.title: Don Graves and the Battle of Iwo Jima
item.description: WWII veteran Don Graves recalls Iwo Jima, where 300 men in his company fought and only Don and seven others walked off the island.

media:content.media:title: Don Graves and the Battle of Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: WWII veteran Don Graves recalls Iwo Jima, where 300 men in his company fought and only Don and seven others walked off the island.

item.title: WWII Veterans Remember D-Day
item.description: World War II veterans reflect on D-Day and share firsthand memories of service, courage, and sacrifice during one of history’s defining moments.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veterans Remember D-Day
media:content.media:description: World War II veterans reflect on D-Day and share firsthand memories of service, courage, and sacrifice during one of history’s defining moments.

item.title: 82nd Airborne Combat Medic and Paralympian
item.description: A profile of an 82nd Airborne combat medic and Paralympian, highlighting service, resilience, and the path from military duty to athletic achievement.

media:content.media:title: 82nd Airborne Combat Medic and Paralympian
media:content.media:description: A profile of an 82nd Airborne combat medic and Paralympian, highlighting service, resilience, and the path from military duty to athletic achievement.

item.title: What Inspired Jack Carr’s The Terminal List
item.description: Jack Carr reflects on the inspiration behind The Terminal List, drawing from his Army service and wartime experience.

media:content.media:title: What Inspired Jack Carr’s The Terminal List
media:content.media:description: Jack Carr reflects on the inspiration behind The Terminal List, drawing from his Army service and wartime experience.

item.title: A Vietnam POW's Seven-Year Survival Story
item.description: A Vietnam POW reflects on seven years of captivity, survival, and endurance during the Vietnam War.

media:content.media:title: A Vietnam POW's Seven-Year Survival Story
media:content.media:description: A Vietnam POW reflects on seven years of captivity, survival, and endurance during the Vietnam War.

item.title: WWII Veteran Recalls Discovering Concentration Camps
item.description: A WWII veteran reflects on the moment his unit discovered the concentration camps, offering a firsthand account of service and historical memory.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Recalls Discovering Concentration Camps
media:content.media:description: A WWII veteran reflects on the moment his unit discovered the concentration camps, offering a firsthand account of service and historical memory.
